requirements.text: Zorn ecosystem modules must not add third-party-facing API outside validated Lattice-shaped surfaces.
SDK/developer tooling must prove compatibility through official SDKs, public Buf-generated gRPC types, sample apps, and existing REST/gRPC surfaces.
Protocol adapters must publish through Entity, Task, Object, Auth, and stream surfaces rather than adapter-specific endpoints.
C2 and developer-console apps may maintain local UI state and read models, but must not redefine Lattice data-plane behavior.
Mission autonomy simulations should route tasking through TaskCatalog-like entity data and existing task lifecycle routes.
Mesh simulation should model distribution, queues, link quality, and reconciliation as local scenario behavior over existing entity/task/object state.
Domain scenario packs should remain plugins above the compatibility data plane and must not modify official Lattice protobuf namespaces.
